input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.2.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.2.2.1
            TITLE: allowable dimensions are absolute, and do not have any tolerance unless specifically stated.

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.2.2.1: Allowable dimensions are absolute, and do not have any tolerance unless specifically stated.
IN.2.2.1 Allowable dimensions are absolute, and do not have any tolerance unless specifically stated.

final_answer: Allowable dimensions are absolute, and do not have any tolerance unless specifically stated.
